ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_records" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media record */,
  "matrix_number" TEXT /* Unique matrix number assigned to the media */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that produced the media */,
  "size" TEXT /* Physical size of the media (e.g., 10-in.) */,
  "first_take_date" TEXT /* Date of the first recording session */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the educational media */,
  "primary_performer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary performer in the media */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the educational content */,
  "media_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media type */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the media */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the format of the media */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the media */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the media (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the media was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the media was last modified */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorization and search */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of the media file */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_records_media_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_type_id") REFERENCES media_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_records_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_records_primary_performer_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_performer_id") REFERENCES performers ("performer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_records_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_records_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES media_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the company */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performers" (
  "performer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performer */,
  "performer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the performer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the performer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise or specialization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the performer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the performer's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the performer's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the media type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the media format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production session */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media being produced */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the production session */,
  "session_details" TEXT /* Details of the production session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production session */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the session */,
  "producers" TEXT /* Producers involved in the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_production_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_records ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution event */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media being distributed */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution channel */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date of distribution */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of copies distributed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the distribution (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_distribution_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES distribution_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_distribution_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_records ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the distribution channel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the distribution channel */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the distribution channel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Channel's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the media */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the media was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the media was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_access_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_records ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, learner, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for personalized recommendations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
